description: A customer wants to change their subscription from being delivered every month to every two months.

nodes.task_description: Log into their account and navigate to the 'Manage Subscription' page.

expected_outcome.value: The customer accesses their subscription details.

nodes.task_description: Select the option to change the delivery frequency.

expected_outcome.value: The customer accesses the frequency setting.

nodes.task_description: Change the frequency from 'Every 1 Month' to 'Every 2 Months' and save.

expected_outcome.value: The subscription schedule is successfully updated to the new frequency.
